requirement.desc: 实现一个低通滤波器，截止频率10Hz，符合MISRA-C标准与DAL-A级别要求

outputs.contract:
component: lowpass_filter_10hz
version: 1.0.0
safety_level: DAL-A
traceability: [REQ-001]
interface:
  inputs:
    - name: raw_input
      type: double
      range: [-20000, 20000]
    - name: sample_rate
      type: double
      range: [99.0, 101.0] # Must be near 100Hz
  outputs:
    - name: filtered_output
      type: double
contracts:
  preconditions:
    - "raw_input != NULL"
    - "sample_rate == 100.0"
    - "filtered_output_state_valid()" # Check previous state validity
  postconditions:
    - "filtered_output >= -20000 && filtered_output <= 20000"
    - "filter_coefficients_are_stable()" # Internal check for coefficient integrity
  invariants:
    - "sample_rate == 100.0"
    - "internal_state_variable >= -20000 && internal_state_variable <= 20000"
  fault_handling:
    - "if (isnan(raw_input) || raw_input > 20000 || raw_input < -20000): set fault_detected = true; filtered_output = last_valid_output;"
